stage1_opus.note: Resumable Opus reviewer (whole-assembly model, continued from S3/S4) verified all 5 wiring-gate items, resolved the S3 grant-admin-error-shape and S4 pending-removal-badge watches, verified groups-page-coordinator. No emergent seam defects: admin-membership invariant has a single owner (adminPubkeys line 238), no concept double-owned, no contract mismatch between grantAdmin return and handleMakeAdmin.

review.stage2_codex: unavailable-transient: Codex review environment failed command execution twice (sandbox filesystem failure, not a config/preflight failure). Deferred to the mandatory Step 6 pre-commit Codex gate, which retries Codex over the whole epic before commit. Rationale: Opus whole-assembly review was clean; Codex already vetted the core grantAdmin protocol logic in the S1-S3 pass; S6 is lower-risk wiring.

implementation_summary: Wired all five blocking-gate items from the ownership-ledger into groups.tsx. Added grantAdmin and getPendingRemovals to the useMarmot() destructure. Added handleMakeAdmin callback (success/error toast; all non-ok results including unrecognized codes map to makeAdminError). Derived adminPubkeys from mlsGroup?.groupData?.adminPubkeys ?? [] as the single source for isAdmin, LeaveGroupButton, and MemberList. Derived pendingRemovalPubkeys synchronously in render body. Wired adminPubkeys + ownPubkeyHex to LeaveGroupButton activating the sole-admin guard. Wired adminPubkeys, isCurrentUserAdmin, onMakeAdmin, pendingRemovalPubkeys to MemberList. Gated onCancelInvite on isAdmin (AC-GATE-3). Existing isAdmin gates for invite/invite-link/manage-links/PendingRequestsSection confirmed intact. Added code comments to i18n.ts removalPendingBadge in both locales explaining the S6 cause-distinction decision.

tests.note: DOM-level wiring verification (handleMakeAdmin success/error → correct toast) is delegated to S7 e2e tests. The error-mapping decision (all non-ok → makeAdminError) has no per-code branching to unit-test beyond the i18n key existence check added here.

decisions_documented.leave_vs_removal_badge: PendingRemoval carries no cause field (spec §2.8 confirmed). All pending removals use leavePendingBadge. removalPendingBadge is kept defined in i18n with a reservation comment — not deleted — for a future cause-distinction increment.
decisions_documented.error_mapping: handleMakeAdmin maps ALL non-ok results from grantAdmin to the generic makeAdminError toast. No switch on specific error codes. This handles the exhausted-retry path that may return a raw marmot-ts message (per grant-admin-error-shape watch in ownership-ledger).
